notes: iteration-2 re-runs the kawaii case AFTER two fixes: (1) footer now shows on `path` slides, (2) Pangaea logo swapped to a clean SVG. Quantitative pass rates are UNCHANGED from iteration-1 (with_skill 100% / baseline 86%) because the assertions don't test footer presence or logo quality — both fixes are VISUAL. Judge them in the Outputs tab.

Footer-on-path: both decks now use a `path` verdict slide. with_skill (live, fixed theme) shows the footer logo+company on it, with the path hero height-capped so the verdict pill clears the footer band. old_skill (snapshot theme) STILL hides it via `section.path footer{display:none}` — the exact behavior the fix removes. That single slide is the clearest before/after.

Logo: BOTH configs now render the new SVG logo (pangaea-logo-final.svg) in the footer — the profile is global — replacing iteration-1's dark/squished PNG. Compare against the iteration-1 column shown as 'previous'.

Baseline still fails the callout assertion (the old kawaii template has no callout class) — it used blockquote 'verdict pills' + a dark statement code slide instead. That remains the only quantitative discriminator.
